verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Many times she called out to you Son of David hear my plea I'm unworthy of a children's bread But you still met her need Like her I'm unworthy But I heard you call me child So by faith I will wait on you And know that all the while

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You always answer me Right in my hour of need Not always how I think you should But always for my good You always answer me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: It seemed the heaven were unopened When I called upon your name Even so come quickly lord In earnest hope I pray But my lowly expectations for your plans Were no match Though broken when you finally came You gave more than I ask

verse.name: v4
verse.lines: How I know you will Is that you have always been true to your word You always heard And lift this willing one Be it unto me according to thy word According to thy way thy will be done

verse.name: v5
verse.lines: Not always how I think You should Not always when I want it But right when I need it You're an on time God And I thankful for it You always answer me
